title: Find My Device - Connected / Nearby device details
scenario: "Find My Device" feature in App Settings correctly displays device name, connection status, description, and Play button for connected headset
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a headset already paired and connected.
2. Navigate to App Settings (e.g., tap the menu icon or gear icon to access Settings).
3. Tap 'Find My Device' in the App Settings menu.
5. Tap the blue geo icon (location/map icon) to view device location details.
expected: A new window displays the device name, connection status ("Connected"), a description stating "Make sure this device is being used as your main audio source to play tone", and a Play button.
